hero.headline: Bridging the gap between
hero.subheadline: ConnekT connects the brightest university tech talents with leading companies. Simple application tracking and smart matching to jumpstart your career.

features.title: Everything you need to
features.subtitle: Powering your internship search with tools designed for the modern student.

smartMatching.title: Smart Matching
smartMatching.desc: Our intelligent matching system connects your unique skills and interests with the best available roles, ensuring a perfect fit for both you and the company.

jobTracking.title: Job Tracking
jobTracking.desc: Stay organized with a centralized dashboard for all your applications. Receive instant notifications on status changes and never miss a follow-up.
details: Document storage for resumes and letters

verifiedCompanies.title: Verified Companies
verifiedCompanies.desc: We manually vet every company and internship post to eliminate scams and low-quality roles, so you can apply with absolute confidence.

about.title: About
about.heading: We help students discover meaningful tech internships while recruiters build stronger campus talent pipelines.
about.body: ConnekT is built for the next generation of innovators. Our mission is to simplify early-career hiring, surface the best-fit opportunities, and create a trusted connection between campus talent and employers.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: To build a seamless ecosystem where academic potential meets industry demand, transforming Cameroon into a thriving tech hub by empowering every university student with transparent, high-impact career pathways.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To accelerate early-tech careers in Cameroon by matching ambitious student developers with verified companies, providing candidates with structured application tracking and recruiters with high-quality campus pipelines.

ctaSection.body: Don't miss out on life-changing opportunities. Join thousands of students already building their future.

footer.tagline: Bridging the gap between Campus and Career for the next generation of tech leaders through seamless internship experiences and smart matching.

successStories.title: Success Stories
successStories.summary: Read how students landed their dream roles with ConnekT and how companies found the right talent faster.
details: Student-led case studies from top universities.
Recruiter success metrics and conversion stories.
Internships that turned into full-time offers.

blog.title: Blog
blog.summary: Insights on career growth, interview prep, and navigating the tech internship landscape.
details: Interview guides for engineering and product roles.
Emerging tech trends students should know.

partnerWithUs.title: Partner with Us
partnerWithUs.summary: Grow your internship pipeline with trusted student talent and benefit from a dedicated recruiter dashboard.
details: Custom hiring campaigns for your company.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.summary: We keep student and recruiter data secure with clear privacy controls and trusted handling practices.
details: Respect for user privacy across the platform.
